parsed.availability_comment: Past 2025 groin issue is outdated; recent 2026 match involvement indicates present fitness, though exact IPL joining/selection status is not explicitly confirmed.
parsed.availability_note: No current IPL 2026 absence report found; active for New Zealand in the 2026 T20 World Cup shortly before IPL fixtures.
parsed.followup_reason: Need GT team-sheet confirmation on whether Phillips or Holder/Rabada is preferred in the opening overseas combination.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Squad build gives GT multiple overseas combinations; Phillips is competing more for balance than for squad availability.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Heavy four-overseas-slot pressure from Buttler, Rashid Khan, Kagiso Rabada and Jason Holder/Tom Banton alternatives.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained and plausible middle-order fit, but overseas balance remains unsettled between Phillips and Holder alongside Buttler, Rashid and Rabada.
